changelog: Phase 7.3 i18n expansion: locales/{ru,en,kk}.json each gain ~80 new keys covering common.* (save/cancel/edit/archive/etc.), account.* (tabs + form labels), owner.* (workspace + tabs), admin.* (9 admin pages), errors.* (auth/forbidden/csrf/validation). New scripts/i18n-extract-strings.php scanner walks PHP/JS, surfaces hardcoded Cyrillic candidates, prints top-30 most-repeated strings and top-20 most-affected files. Skips already-migrated lines (containing t(), SQL keywords, or below min-len). JSON output via --json --out=PATH. Docs in docs/i18n.md cover architecture, lookup chain, surface coverage, migration workflow, gaps.
